summary: Architecture implementation correct: subagents preload skills via skills: field, increment orchestrator uses Agent() calls, all docs (internal, public glossary, docs-site) aligned. 53 new tests pass. Two LOW issues: internal doc example shows NO context:fork but actual skills have it; public glossary missing When to Create a Skill onboarding section.

issues.title: Internal doc example contradicts actual skill frontmatter
issues.description: SKILLS-VS-AGENTS.md line 128 shows '# NO context: fork' in skill template example, but actual PM/Architect/Planner skills have context: fork for standalone invocation

issues.title: Public glossary missing onboarding section
issues.description: Old glossary had useful 'When to Create a Skill' section with DRY principle examples. The rewrite dropped it.
